description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds Doxygen documentation on push to the main branch and deploys it to GitHub Pages. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment with permissions to read actions, write contents, and write pages. It should install Clang, Doxygen 1.11.0, and graphviz, generate Doxygen documentation from a configuration file, and deploy the resulting HTML to the gh-pages branch using a token from secrets.
